title: forms — published events
description: Form authoring lifecycle + public submission stream. FormSubmissionCompleted is the trigger every domain handoff hangs off — most cross-module cascades ride this event. FormFileUploaded is HIGH VOLUME for medical questionnaires — sampled 10% for activity log.

events.name: FormVersionCreated
events.trigger: New FormVersion row (draft). Field schema + label bundle.

events.name: FormPublished
events.trigger: Form.published_version_id set; Form.status → 'published'. Public URL becomes live.

events.name: FormVersionRolledBack
events.trigger: P1 event. published_version_id swapped to a prior version. Reason REQUIRED.

events.name: FormSubmissionStarted
events.trigger: Anonymous user opened the form + started answering. FormSubmission row created with status='in_progress'.

events.name: FormSubmissionResumed
events.trigger: User clicked the resume-session email link. Same submission, new session slot.

events.name: FormSubmissionCompleted
events.trigger: P0 event. User completed the form. status: in_progress → completed. Handoff fires next (sync or via RunFormHandoffJob).

events.name: FormSubmissionAbandoned
events.trigger: Session TTL elapsed without completion. Swept by PurgeAbandonedSessionsJob.

events.name: FormSubmissionValidationFailed
events.trigger: P1 event. Submit-time validation failed. status: in_progress → failed_validation. User can retry.

events.name: FormHandoffFired
events.trigger: P0 event. Handoff handler ran. Downstream domain entity created (Registration / MedicalClearance / WaiverConsent).

events.name: FormHandoffFailed
events.trigger: P0 event. Handoff handler threw. Retried per exponential backoff; alerts admin after N failures.

events.name: FormFileUploaded
events.trigger: HIGH VOLUME. Medical clearance / signature / photo uploaded through storage module.
